← Back to Portfolio Residential Design — Infintree Investment Group — Category 02

The working heart, reconsidered.

Concept Statement

The thinking behind the room.

Designed for Infintree Investment Group in Toronto, this kitchen pairs a book-matched stone island with dark walnut-toned cabinetry and brushed-black hardware — a warm, low-contrast palette meant to hold its own against a full-height city view. Every run was planned around a single unbroken worktop and a matching dining table, so the cooking, serving and gathering zones read as one continuous surface rather than three separate rooms.

Client
Infintree Investment Group Inc.
Location
Toronto, Canada
Designer
Niusha Meymandinejad
